plan.phase_1: Build FreeAIClient in Python and place in server/app/free_ai_client.py.
plan.phase_2: Update server/app/main.py to expose the internal pantry endpoint (/api/internal/pantry/inventory) and proxy AI generation requests to FreeAIClient.
plan.phase_3: Create server/app/health_unified.py for combined health checks (Python + Node.js AI Engine).
plan.phase_4: Update orchestrator.py to default to the FreeAIClient for intelligent interactions.
